options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <blackBoxName> # Specifies the name of the blackbox.

options.name: -aspectRatio
options.description: Specifies the new aspect ratio, which is height divided by width, with the blackbox area constant.

options.name: -height
options.description: Specifies the new height in user units.

options.name: -width
options.description: Specifies the new width in user units.
